title: ACEF Assessment Bundle
description: JSON Schema for .acef-assessment.json — a separate, signed JSON artifact that captures validation results. Produced by validators, auditors, or notified bodies. References an Evidence Bundle by content hash. Contains per-rule outcomes, provision roll-ups, structural errors, and an optional integrity signature.

versioning.description: Module version declarations. Assessment Bundles declare core_version and assessment_version.

evaluation_instant.description: The single reference time for all date-sensitive rule logic. Set by the validator at the start of evaluation. All rules using validation_time resolve to this value. Ensures reproducible evaluation.

assessor.description: Tool or entity that performed the assessment.

evidence_bundle_ref.description: Reference to the Evidence Bundle being assessed.

content_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the RFC 8785-canonicalized content-hashes.json from the Evidence Bundle (the bundle digest).

package_id.description: URN of the Evidence Bundle package.

profiles_evaluated.description: List of profile_id:version strings for each regulation mapping template evaluated.

template_digests.description: Map of profile_id:version to SHA-256 hash of the template file used. Ensures reproducibility even if templates are later updated.

additionalProperties.description: SHA-256 hash of the regulation mapping template.

rule_id.description: Unique rule identifier within the template (as declared in the template's evaluation rules).

provision_id.description: The provision this rule belongs to (e.g., 'article-9').

profile_id.description: The regulation profile this rule belongs to (e.g., 'eu-ai-act-2024').

rule_severity.description: The importance level declared by the rule in the template. This is a property of the rule, not the result.

outcome.description: The result of evaluating the rule against the evidence. 'skipped' means the rule's condition evaluated to false. 'error' means the rule could not be evaluated.

message.description: Human-readable explanation of the outcome. Null if passed without comment.

evidence_refs.description: URNs of evidence records that contributed to this result.

subject_scope.description: URNs of subjects this result applies to (for per-subject evaluation).

provision_summary.description: Per-provision roll-up results computed using the 7-step deterministic precedence algorithm.

profile_id.description: The regulation profile this provision belongs to.

provision_outcome.description: Roll-up outcome computed using the 7-step precedence: not-satisfied > not-assessed > skipped > gap-acknowledged > partially-satisfied > satisfied.

subject_scope.description: URNs of subjects this summary covers. Required for per-subject evaluation in multi-subject bundles.

fail_count.description: Number of rules with severity 'fail' that had outcome 'failed'.

warning_count.description: Number of rules with severity 'warning' that had outcome 'failed'.

evidence_refs.description: URNs of all evidence records relevant to this provision.

structural_errors.description: Structural errors found in the Evidence Bundle during validation. Uses the normative error taxonomy from Section 3.6 with JSON Pointer paths for precise location.

code.description: Error code from the ACEF error taxonomy (e.g., 'ACEF-002', 'ACEF-020').

severity.description: Severity level from the error taxonomy.

path.description: JSON Pointer (RFC 6901) to the location in the Evidence Bundle where the error was found.

context.description: Additional structured context about the error (e.g., expected vs. actual hash, missing URN).

integrity.description: JWS signature over the Assessment Bundle. Set to null before signing; populated after signing. Always present in the JSON structure (never removed).

value.description: JWS compact serialization computed over RFC 8785-canonicalized Assessment Bundle JSON with integrity set to null.
